query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.deleted_accounts (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), email TEXT NOT NULL, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), cooldown_until TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, application_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, summary_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT false); ALTER TABLE public.deleted_accounts ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY "Service role only for deleted_accounts" ON public.deleted_accounts FOR ALL USING (false);
